stemHtml: A pilot with a MPL (Multi-crew pilot licence) licence and an MCC (Multi-crew cooperation) certificate can...

options.a: act as a commander on a plane that requires a copilot.
options.b: act as a copilot on a plane that requires a copilot.
options.c: act as a commander on a plane that requires a single pilot.
options.d: act as a commander on a plane that does not require a copilot.
